title: trifolium × neyrautii
intro: Trifolium × neyrautii, also known as Neyraut's clover or French clover, is a rare hybrid species of clover that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium × neyrautii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
